description: Style NoteSober coloured base with a slight heel make these sandals classy and elegant. They can be worn with ethnic Indian wear as well as with a pair of jeans and a nice kurta with some ethnic accessories.Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with a thong style strap with crystal and gem embellishmentsLight brown footbed with a kitten heel TPU outsole with a plastic heel capHeel: 2& rdquo Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
